ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transport_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation request */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the request was received */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source location */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target location */,
  "ept" TEXT /* Estimated processing time */,
  "ldt" TEXT /* Latest delivery time */,
  "capability" TEXT /* Capabilities required for the request (e.g., C,D) */,
  "request_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  "assigned_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned vehicle */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispatcher who handled the request */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the request */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the request */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., planned, in_progress, completed) */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., assigned, en_route, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_requests_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_requests_dispatcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("dispatcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_requests_assigned_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transport_requests_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities of the vehicle (e.g., A,B,C,D) */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, in_use, maintenance) */,
  "current_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current location of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, driver, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Department head of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capability */,
  "capability_name" TEXT /* Name of the capability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capability */,
  "capability_group" TEXT /* Group of related capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation request */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "route_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the route */,
  "route_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the route */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the route in minutes */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., planned, in_progress, completed) */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., assigned, en_route, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES transport_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the stop on the route */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the stop */,
  "stop_status" TEXT /* Status of the stop (e.g., completed, pending, skipped) */,
  "arrived_at" TEXT /* Time the vehicle arrived at the stop */,
  "departed_at" TEXT /* Time the vehicle departed from the stop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stop was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stop was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_drivers" (
  "vehicle_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-driver assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, unassigned) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_drivers_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_costs" (
  "route_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route cost record */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., fuel, toll, labor) */,
  "cost_status" TEXT /* Status of the cost (e.g., estimated, actual) */,
  "fuel_cost" REAL /* Cost of fuel for the route */,
  "toll_cost" REAL /* Cost of tolls for the route */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Cost of labor for the route */,
  "misc_cost" REAL /* Miscellaneous costs for the route */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_costs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_events" (
  "route_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route event */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., delay, accident) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_events_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_deliveries" (
  "route_delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route delivery */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route stop */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., delivered, pending) */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time of delivery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_deliveries_route_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_stop_id") REFERENCES route_stops ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_deliveries_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle inspection */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was performed */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., safety, maintenance) */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inspections_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the inspector (e.g., safety, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license held by the driver (e.g., CDL, non-CDL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)
